items.name_en: 💖【Complete Original Packaging】💖【New Arrival】Best-selling vintage-style underarm bag, made of new soft fat sheepskin, soft and premium leather. This Aventure leather bag is inspired by the 2009 M-series classic design, restructured to reinterpret the unique shape and refresh its personality. Embossed letter logo adds a signature element, vintage gold hardware, linen blend lining, and a long wrist strap for use as a handbag or shoulder bag.
items.name_cn:
💖【Complete Original Packaging】💖【New Arrival】Best-selling vintage-style underarm bag, made of new soft fat sheepskin, soft and premium leather. This Aventure leather bag is inspired by the 2009 M-series classic design, restructured to reinterpret the unique shape and refresh its personality. Embossed letter logo adds a signature element, vintage gold hardware, linen blend lining, and a long wrist strap for use as a handbag or shoulder bag.
Model: 5BC182.
Size: 33x19x5cm
Color: Ebony/Original Leather.
Italian Craft

items.name_en: 💖【New】MIU MIU Arcadia
items.name_cn:
💖【New】MIU MIU Arcadia
Caramel bowling bag look! Miu Miu Ladies Calfskin Handbag Shoulder Bag 👝 Lightweight padded design makes the bag look fuller, showcasing a metropolitan style. The letter logo, echoing the finish of metal hardware, bridges the gap between function and decoration, giving this handbag a unique aesthetic and classic vibe.
Model: 500142.
Size: 22(L) x 10.5(W) x 7.5cm(H)
Color: Brown/Original Leather

items.name_en: 💖【New】MIU MIU Bestseller Bowling Bag, made of top-tier vintage soft nappa leather, vintage matte finish with aged metal hardware. Inspired by Miu's classic pieces, this Adventure Nappa leather handbag has a restructured, lighter design for a fresh personality. It creates a timeless classic with a unique look. Features a detachable and adjustable leather shoulder strap, canvas lining with a zip pocket and slip pocket.

items.name_en: 💖Full Original Retail Packaging💖【New】MIU Vintage Crossbody Dumpling Bag, brand new soft calfskin, full of retro nostalgia, paired with aged steel hardware, premium and elegant texture. The bag features a drawstring closure, with fine pleated ruffles that are 3D and playful, sophisticated yet lazy and casual. Lined with brand new striped canvas, equipped with a zippered compartment. A unique design that looks good on everyone.
items.name_cn:

A unique design that looks good on everyone.
Model: 5BG306.
Size: 32✖️16✖️10.5
Color: Ebony Full Leather/Original Leather.

items.name_en: 💖Full Original Retail Packaging💖MIUMIU 24ss Autumn/Winter New Baguette Bag
items.name_cn:
💖Full Original Retail Packaging💖MIUMIU 24ss Autumn/Winter New Baguette Bag
The baguette design leads new trends, full of 'girly sentiment' centered around an intellectual vibe, a free-spirited and chic big sister style showing a casual attitude, revealing the unique charm of a Miu Miu girl. Just the right size, sweet yet spicy or cool and handsome, and the capacity meets daily needs. Good-looking and practical, it's hard not to love it!
Model: 5BD265.
Size: 28x11x15cm.
Color: Brown Full Leather/Original Leather.
Italian Creation

items.name_en: 💖Includes full original retail packaging💖【New Arrival】Miu Miu's new best-selling bowling bag, made with top-tier vintage soft nappa leather, vintage matte-finish aged metal hardware. Inspired by Miu Miu's archival pieces, this Aventure Nappa tote has been restructured to be lighter and exudes a fresh personality, creating a classic style with timeless charm. The multi-element design gives this tote a unique aesthetic and classic vibe. Removable and adjustable leather shoulder strap, canvas lining with zip pocket and slip pocket. Model: 5bb168. Dimensions: 33(L) x 16.5(W) x 10cm(H). Color: Brown/Original Leather

Inspired by Miu Miu's archival pieces, this Aventure Nappa tote has been restructured to be lighter and exudes a fresh personality, creating a classic style with timeless charm. The multi-element design gives this tote a unique aesthetic and classic vibe. Removable and adjustable leather shoulder strap, canvas lining with zip pocket and slip pocket. Model: 5bb169. Dimensions: 28(L) x 16.5(W) x 10cm(H). Color: Brown/Original Leather
